_review: DRAFT — pending author review. Current (v2) classification after the Dec 2025 charter conversion.
mintNote: Paxos-published devnet PYUSD (Token-2022). Mainnet display ref: 2b1kV6DkPAnxd5ixfnxCpjxmKwqjjaYmCZfHsFu24GXo

pathwayBasis.summary: Permitted issuers include Federal qualified payment stablecoin issuers; §2(11)(B) covers uninsured national banks chartered by the Comptroller.

statusBasis.reference: OCC approval — Paxos NYDFS-to-national-trust conversion, completed Dec 12, 2025
statusBasis.summary: Paxos converted to an OCC national trust charter Dec 12, 2025, moving PYUSD to federal oversight. Registry v1 records the prior state classification.

reserveBasis.summary: Reserves must back outstanding stablecoins at least 1:1 in enumerated assets: currency, insured deposits, ≤93-day Treasuries, repos, government MMFs.

redemptionBasis.summary: Issuer must publicly disclose a redemption policy with clear procedures for timely redemption; fee changes require at least 7 days' prior notice.
